trans-unit.source: Exercise 2: Automation of Exposed Population Estimation – Aina's Model
trans-unit.target: Exercise 2: Automation of Exposed Population Estimation – Aina's Model

trans-unit.source: Characteristics of the exercise
trans-unit.target: Characteristics of the exercise

trans-unit.source: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Type of trainings exercise:__ ^^^
trans-unit.target: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Type of trainings exercise:__ ^^^

trans-unit.source: This exercise can be used in online and presence training.
trans-unit.target: This exercise can be used in online and presence training.

trans-unit.source: It can be done as a follow-along exercise or individually as a self-study.
trans-unit.target: It can be done as a follow-along exercise or individually as a self-study.

trans-unit.source: :::{grid-item-card} __Exercise Track:__
trans-unit.target: :::{grid-item-card} __Exercise Track:__

trans-unit.source: This exercise is part of the [Madagascar Anticipatory Action Cyclon Analysis Exercise Track](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Exercise_tracks/en_mdg_aa_cyclones.html)
trans-unit.target: This exercise is part of the [Madagascar Anticipatory Action Cyclon Analysis Exercise Track](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Exercise_tracks/en_mdg_aa_cyclones.html)

trans-unit.source: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Estimated time demand for the exercise__ ^^^
trans-unit.target: ::::{grid} 2 :::{grid-item-card} __Estimated time demand for the exercise__ ^^^

trans-unit.source: [Zonal Statistics](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_raster_basic_wiki.html)
trans-unit.target: [Zonal Statistics](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_raster_basic_wiki.html)

trans-unit.source: [Intersection](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_spatial_joins_wiki.html#join-attributes-by-location-summary)
trans-unit.target: [Intersection](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_spatial_joins_wiki.html#join-attributes-by-location-summary)

trans-unit.source: [Projections](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)
trans-unit.target: [Projections](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)

trans-unit.source: [Buffer](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)
trans-unit.target: [Buffer](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)

trans-unit.source: [Clip](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)
trans-unit.target: [Clip](/content/Wiki/en_qgis_projections_wiki.md)

trans-unit.source: [Automation](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_automation_wiki.html)
trans-unit.target: [Automation](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Wiki/en_qgis_automation_wiki.html)

trans-unit.source: :::{card} :class-card: sd-border-1 sd-shadow-none __Aim of the exercise:__ Aina, the GIS expert at the Malagasy Red Cross (CRM), is preparing for the upcoming cyclone season. She wants to improve her team’s ability to act quickly once a storm is forecasted by automating key analyses in QGIS. These include estimating exposed populations, identifying impacted services like health and education, and assessing whether health posts can be reached from key warehouses within a critical 10-hour window. The goal is to prepare an end-to-end analysis and visualization workflow that can support fast, data-driven anticipatory action before a cyclone makes landfall. ^^^
trans-unit.target: :::{card} :class-card: sd-border-1 sd-shadow-none __Aim of the exercise:__ Aina, the GIS expert at the Malagasy Red Cross (CRM), is preparing for the upcoming cyclone season. She wants to improve her team’s ability to act quickly once a storm is forecasted by automating key analyses in QGIS. These include estimating exposed populations, identifying impacted services like health and education, and assessing whether health posts can be reached from key warehouses within a critical 10-hour window. The goal is to prepare an end-to-end analysis and visualization workflow that can support fast, data-driven anticipatory action before a cyclone makes landfall. ^^^

trans-unit.source: Instructions for the trainers
trans-unit.target: Instructions for the trainers

trans-unit.source: :::{dropdown} __Trainers Corner__
trans-unit.target: :::{dropdown} __Trainers Corner__

trans-unit.source: Prepare the training
trans-unit.target: Prepare the training

trans-unit.source: Take the time to familiarise yourself with the exercise and the provided material.
trans-unit.target: Take the time to familiarise yourself with the exercise and the provided material.

trans-unit.source: Prepare a white-board. It can be either a physical whiteboard, a flip-chart, or a digital whiteboard (e.g. Miro board) where the participants can add their findings and questions.
trans-unit.target: Prepare a white-board. It can be either a physical whiteboard, a flip-chart, or a digital whiteboard (e.g. Miro board) where the participants can add their findings and questions.

trans-unit.source: Before starting the exercise, make sure everybody has installed QGIS and has downloaded __and unzipped__ the data folder.
trans-unit.target: Before starting the exercise, make sure everybody has installed QGIS and has downloaded __and unzipped__ the data folder.

trans-unit.source: Check out [How to do trainings?](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.html#how-to-do-trainings) for some general tips on training conduction
trans-unit.target: Check out [How to do trainings?](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.html#how-to-do-trainings) for some general tips on training conduction

trans-unit.source: Conduct the training
trans-unit.target: Conduct the training

trans-unit.source: __Introduction:__
trans-unit.target: __Introduction:__

trans-unit.source: Introduce the idea and aim of the exercise.
trans-unit.target: Introduce the idea and aim of the exercise.

trans-unit.source: Provide the download link and make sure everybody has unzipped the folder before beginning the tasks.
trans-unit.target: Provide the download link and make sure everybody has unzipped the folder before beginning the tasks.

trans-unit.source: __Follow-along:__
trans-unit.target: __Follow-along:__

trans-unit.source: Show and explain each step yourself at least twice and slow enough so everybody can see what you are doing, and follow along in their own QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: Show and explain each step yourself at least twice and slow enough so everybody can see what you are doing, and follow along in their own QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: Make sure that everybody is following along and doing the steps themselves by periodically asking if anybody needs help or if everybody is still following.
trans-unit.target: Make sure that everybody is following along and doing the steps themselves by periodically asking if anybody needs help or if everybody is still following.

trans-unit.source: Be open and patient to every question or problem that might come up. Your participants are essentially multitasking by paying attention to your instructions and orienting themselves in their own QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: Be open and patient to every question or problem that might come up. Your participants are essentially multitasking by paying attention to your instructions and orienting themselves in their own QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: __Wrap up:__
trans-unit.target: __Wrap up:__

trans-unit.source: Leave time for any issues or questions concerning the tasks at the end of the exercise.
trans-unit.target: Leave time for any issues or questions concerning the tasks at the end of the exercise.

trans-unit.source: Leave some time for open questions.
trans-unit.target: Leave some time for open questions.

trans-unit.source: After manually estimating exposed populations in past cyclone seasons, Aina has decided to prepare an **automated model** using the **QGIS Graphical Modeller**. This will help her move faster and avoid repeating the same steps manually each time a cyclone is forecasted.
trans-unit.target: After manually estimating exposed populations in past cyclone seasons, Aina has decided to prepare an **automated model** using the **QGIS Graphical Modeller**. This will help her move faster and avoid repeating the same steps manually each time a cyclone is forecasted.

trans-unit.source: In this task, you will help Aina build a simple version of that model using the tools from Task 1. The model should:
trans-unit.target: In this task, you will help Aina build a simple version of that model using the tools from Task 1. The model should:

trans-unit.source: Reproject the cyclone track to EPSG:29738
trans-unit.target: Reproject the cyclone track to EPSG:29738

trans-unit.source: Buffer the cyclone track
trans-unit.target: Buffer the cyclone track

trans-unit.source: Reproject the buffer back to EPSG:4326
trans-unit.target: Reproject the buffer back to EPSG:4326

trans-unit.source: Clip the population raster
trans-unit.target: Clip the population raster

trans-unit.source: Run Zonal Statistics to get exposed population per district
trans-unit.target: Run Zonal Statistics to get exposed population per district

trans-unit.source: Tasks
trans-unit.target: Tasks

trans-unit.source: **Set up the model structure**:
trans-unit.target: **Set up the model structure**:

trans-unit.source: Open the **Graphical Modeler** from the top menu: `Processing` → `Graphical Modeler…`
trans-unit.target: Open the **Graphical Modeler** from the top menu: `Processing` → `Graphical Modeler…`

trans-unit.source: **Naming the model**:
trans-unit.target: **Naming the model**:

trans-unit.source: A new model window will open. On the **left side**, click on **`Model Properties`** to define basic information about the model:
trans-unit.target: A new model window will open. On the **left side**, click on **`Model Properties`** to define basic information about the model:

trans-unit.source: **Model Name**: `Estimate_Exposed_Population`
trans-unit.target: **Model Name**: `Estimate_Exposed_Population`

trans-unit.source: **Group**: `Cyclone Trigger Tools`
trans-unit.target: **Group**: `Cyclone Trigger Tools`

trans-unit.source: Leave the description empty or write: _“Automated model to estimate exposed population based on cyclone buffer.”_
trans-unit.target: Leave the description empty or write: _“Automated model to estimate exposed population based on cyclone buffer.”_

trans-unit.source: **Save the model**
trans-unit.target: **Save the model**

trans-unit.source: To save the model:
trans-unit.target: To save the model:

trans-unit.source: Click the **Save** icon (💾) or go to `Model` → `Save`.
trans-unit.target: Click the **Save** icon (💾) or go to `Model` → `Save`.

trans-unit.source: Navigate to the **`models` folder** of your training structure.
trans-unit.target: Navigate to the **`models` folder** of your training structure.

trans-unit.source: Save the model as: **`Estimate_Exposed_Population`**
trans-unit.target: Save the model as: **`Estimate_Exposed_Population`**

trans-unit.source: **Add model inputs**:
trans-unit.target: **Add model inputs**:

trans-unit.source: On the **left panel**, expand the **Inputs** section.
trans-unit.target: On the **left panel**, expand the **Inputs** section.

trans-unit.source: Add the following input layers with type constraints:
trans-unit.target: Add the following input layers with type constraints:

trans-unit.source: **Label**: `Cyclone Track`
trans-unit.target: **Label**: `Cyclone Track`

trans-unit.source: In the **Advanced panel**, set **geometry type** to `Line`
trans-unit.target: In the **Advanced panel**, set **geometry type** to `Line`

trans-unit.source: **Label**: `Population Raster`
trans-unit.target: **Label**: `Population Raster`

trans-unit.source: **Label**: `Admin Boundaries`
trans-unit.target: **Label**: `Admin Boundaries`

trans-unit.source: In the **Advanced panel**, set **geometry type** to `Polygon`
trans-unit.target: In the **Advanced panel**, set **geometry type** to `Polygon`

trans-unit.source: These will appear at the top of your model canvas and serve as the input data when the model is run.
trans-unit.target: These will appear at the top of your model canvas and serve as the input data when the model is run.

trans-unit.source: ::::{tab-item} Input Cyclon Track :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_cyclon_track.PNG
trans-unit.target: ::::{tab-item} Input Cyclon Track :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_cyclon_track.PNG

trans-unit.source: Definition of the model input: Cyclon Track ::: ::::
trans-unit.target: Definition of the model input: Cyclon Track ::: ::::

trans-unit.source: ::::{tab-item} Input Admin Boundaries :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_admin_bounderies.PNG
trans-unit.target: ::::{tab-item} Input Admin Boundaries :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_admin_bounderies.PNG

trans-unit.source: Definition of the model input: Admin Bounderies ::: ::::
trans-unit.target: Definition of the model input: Admin Bounderies ::: ::::

trans-unit.source: ::::{tab-item} Population Raster :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_population_raster.PNG
trans-unit.target: ::::{tab-item} Population Raster :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_population_raster.PNG

trans-unit.source: Definition of the model input: Population Raster ::: :::: :::::
trans-unit.target: Definition of the model input: Population Raster ::: :::: :::::

trans-unit.source: **Intermediate Result**
trans-unit.target: **Intermediate Result**

trans-unit.source: Résultat intermédiaire de la définition des données d'entrée du modèle :::
trans-unit.target: Résultat intermédiaire de la définition des données d'entrée du modèle :::

trans-unit.source: **Reproject the cyclone track to EPSG:29738**
trans-unit.target: **Reproject the cyclone track to EPSG:29738**

trans-unit.source: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Reproject Layer** .
trans-unit.target: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Reproject Layer** .

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window:
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window:

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Reprojecter la couche de trajectoire du cyclone a EPSG : 29738`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Reprojecter la couche de trajectoire du cyclone a EPSG : 29738`

trans-unit.source: Set **Input layer** to `Cyclone Track` (from **Model Input**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Input layer** to `Cyclone Track` (from **Model Input**).

trans-unit.source: Set **Target CRS** to `EPSG:29738 – Madagascar / Laborde Grid`.
trans-unit.target: Set **Target CRS** to `EPSG:29738 – Madagascar / Laborde Grid`.

trans-unit.source: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).
trans-unit.target: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).

trans-unit.source: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_reporject_cyclon_track.PNG
trans-unit.target: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_reporject_cyclon_track.PNG

trans-unit.source: Reprojecter la couche de trajectoire du cyclone vers un système de référence de coordonnées métrique (CRS) EPSG : 29738 ::: 6. **Buffer the reprojected cyclone track**
trans-unit.target: Reprojecter la couche de trajectoire du cyclone vers un système de référence de coordonnées métrique (CRS) EPSG : 29738 ::: 6. **Buffer the reprojected cyclone track**

trans-unit.source: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Buffer**.
trans-unit.target: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Buffer**.

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window:
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window:

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Mettre en mémoire tampon la couche Cyclone reprojetée`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Mettre en mémoire tampon la couche Cyclone reprojetée`

trans-unit.source: Add a description:
trans-unit.target: Add a description:

trans-unit.source: Set **Input layer** to the output from the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Input layer** to the output from the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).

trans-unit.source: Set **Distance** to `200000` (200 km).
trans-unit.target: Set **Distance** to `200000` (200 km).

trans-unit.source: Leave **Segments** at the default value (`5`).
trans-unit.target: Leave **Segments** at the default value (`5`).

trans-unit.source: Set **Dissolve result** to `Yes`.
trans-unit.target: Set **Dissolve result** to `Yes`.

trans-unit.source: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).
trans-unit.target: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).

trans-unit.source: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_buffer_cyclon_track.PNG
trans-unit.target: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_buffer_cyclon_track.PNG

trans-unit.source: Mettre en mémoire tampon la couche Cyclone reprojetée ::: 7. **Reproject the buffer back to EPSG:4326**
trans-unit.target: Mettre en mémoire tampon la couche Cyclone reprojetée ::: 7. **Reproject the buffer back to EPSG:4326**

trans-unit.source: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Reproject Layer**.
trans-unit.target: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Reproject Layer**.

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window:
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window:

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Reprojecter le tampon vers EPSG:4326`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Reprojecter le tampon vers EPSG:4326`

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window:
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window:

trans-unit.source: Set **Input layer** to the output from the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Input layer** to the output from the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).

trans-unit.source: Set **Target CRS** to `EPSG:4326 – WGS 84`.
trans-unit.target: Set **Target CRS** to `EPSG:4326 – WGS 84`.

trans-unit.source: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).
trans-unit.target: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).

trans-unit.source: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_reporject_bufferd_cyclon_track.PNG
trans-unit.target: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_reporject_bufferd_cyclon_track.PNG

trans-unit.source: Reprojecter le tampon vers EPSG:4326 ::: 8. **Clip the population raster using the buffered area**
trans-unit.target: Reprojecter le tampon vers EPSG:4326 ::: 8. **Clip the population raster using the buffered area**

trans-unit.source: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Clip Raster by Mask Layer** .
trans-unit.target: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Clip Raster by Mask Layer** .

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window:
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window:

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Découper la couche raster de population pour l'étendre au tampon Cyclon`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Découper la couche raster de population pour l'étendre au tampon Cyclon`

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window:
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window:

trans-unit.source: Set **Input layer** to `Population Raster` (from **Model Input**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Input layer** to `Population Raster` (from **Model Input**).

trans-unit.source: Set **Mask layer** to the output from the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Mask layer** to the output from the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).

trans-unit.source: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).
trans-unit.target: Set the output to **Model Output** (leave the output name **empty**).

trans-unit.source: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_clip_pop_raster.PNG
trans-unit.target: Click **OK** to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_clip_pop_raster.PNG

trans-unit.source: Découper la couche raster de population pour l'étendre au tampon Cyclon ::: 9. **Calculate zonal statistics to estimate exposed population**
trans-unit.target: Découper la couche raster de population pour l'étendre au tampon Cyclon ::: 9. **Calculate zonal statistics to estimate exposed population**

trans-unit.source: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Zonal Statistics** .
trans-unit.target: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Zonal Statistics** .

trans-unit.source: In the configuration window: Calcul de la population exposée aux cyclones par district
trans-unit.target: In the configuration window: Calcul de la population exposée aux cyclones par district

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Calcul de la population exposée aux cyclones par district`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Calcul de la population exposée aux cyclones par district`

trans-unit.source: Set **Input layer** to `Admin Boundaries` (from **Model Input**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Input layer** to `Admin Boundaries` (from **Model Input**).

trans-unit.source: Set **Raster layer** to the output of the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).
trans-unit.target: Set **Raster layer** to the output of the previous step (from **Algorithm Output**).

trans-unit.source: Set **Output column prefix** to `exposed_population_`.
trans-unit.target: Set **Output column prefix** to `exposed_population_`.

trans-unit.source: Under **Statistics to calculate**, select `Sum`.
trans-unit.target: Under **Statistics to calculate**, select `Sum`.

trans-unit.source: Set the output to **Model Output** and name it:
trans-unit.target: Set the output to **Model Output** and name it:

trans-unit.source: Click `OK` to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_zonal_statistic_pop_admin2.PNG
trans-unit.target: Click `OK` to add the step to the model. :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_zonal_statistic_pop_admin2.PNG

trans-unit.source: Calcul de la population exposée aux cyclones par district :::
trans-unit.target: Calcul de la population exposée aux cyclones par district :::

trans-unit.source: **Your results should look something like this:**
trans-unit.target: **Your results should look something like this:**

trans-unit.source: Votre modèle devrait ressembler à ceci. Tous les algorithmes sont correctement connectés et la sortie du modèle est définie. :::
trans-unit.target: Votre modèle devrait ressembler à ceci. Tous les algorithmes sont correctement connectés et la sortie du modèle est définie. :::

trans-unit.source: **Validate your model (recommended)**
trans-unit.target: **Validate your model (recommended)**

trans-unit.source: Before saving or running, click the ✔️ **Validate Model** button in the top toolbar.
trans-unit.target: Before saving or running, click the ✔️ **Validate Model** button in the top toolbar.

trans-unit.source: Fix any warnings or errors shown in the log panel.
trans-unit.target: Fix any warnings or errors shown in the log panel.

trans-unit.source: This helps ensure your model is complete and won't break during execution.
trans-unit.target: This helps ensure your model is complete and won't break during execution.

trans-unit.source: **Run the model**
trans-unit.target: **Run the model**

trans-unit.source: Run the model by clicking on `Model` -> `Run Model`
trans-unit.target: Run the model by clicking on `Model` -> `Run Model`

trans-unit.source: Set **Admin Bounderies** to `mdg_admbnda_adm2_BNGRC_OCHA_20181031.gpkg`
trans-unit.target: Set **Admin Bounderies** to `mdg_admbnda_adm2_BNGRC_OCHA_20181031.gpkg`

trans-unit.source: Set **Cyclone Track** to `example_Harald_2025_Track`
trans-unit.target: Set **Cyclone Track** to `example_Harald_2025_Track`

trans-unit.source: Set **Population Raster** to `MDG_WorldPop_2020_constrained.tif`
trans-unit.target: Set **Population Raster** to `MDG_WorldPop_2020_constrained.tif`

trans-unit.source: Set the model output **exposed_population_sum** to `Harald_Exposed_Population`and save it in the `data` -> `output`
trans-unit.target: Set the model output **exposed_population_sum** to `Harald_Exposed_Population`and save it in the `data` -> `output`

trans-unit.source: You can now run this model any time a new cyclone track becomes available.
trans-unit.target: You can now run this model any time a new cyclone track becomes available.

trans-unit.source: Pour exécuter le modèle, spécifiez l'entrée comme indiqué dans l'image et définissez le nom de la couche de sortie. :::
trans-unit.target: Pour exécuter le modèle, spécifiez l'entrée comme indiqué dans l'image et définissez le nom de la couche de sortie. :::

trans-unit.source: **Your results should look something like this:** :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_task1_basics.PNG
trans-unit.target: **Your results should look something like this:** :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_task1_basics.PNG

trans-unit.source: ::: 12. **Add the cyclone buffer as an additional model output**
trans-unit.target: ::: 12. **Add the cyclone buffer as an additional model output**

trans-unit.source: Double-click on the algorithm from step 7 (**Reproject the buffer back to EPSG:4326**) to open its configuration.
trans-unit.target: Double-click on the algorithm from step 7 (**Reproject the buffer back to EPSG:4326**) to open its configuration.

trans-unit.source: In the **Output layer** field, check the box for **Model Output**.
trans-unit.target: In the **Output layer** field, check the box for **Model Output**.

trans-unit.source: Give the output a clear name, for example:
trans-unit.target: Give the output a clear name, for example:

trans-unit.source: Click **OK** to save the change.
trans-unit.target: Click **OK** to save the change.

trans-unit.source: This will allow the model to produce both the exposed population results and the buffered cyclone impact zone when it is run.
trans-unit.target: This will allow the model to produce both the exposed population results and the buffered cyclone impact zone when it is run.

trans-unit.source: **Run the model again**
trans-unit.target: **Run the model again**

trans-unit.source: Run the model by clicking on `Model` -> `Run Model`
trans-unit.target: Run the model by clicking on `Model` -> `Run Model`

trans-unit.source: Set **Admin Bounderies** to `mdg_admbnda_adm2_BNGRC_OCHA_20181031.gpkg`
trans-unit.target: Set **Admin Bounderies** to `mdg_admbnda_adm2_BNGRC_OCHA_20181031.gpkg`

trans-unit.source: Set **Cyclone Track** to `example_Harald_2025_Track`
trans-unit.target: Set **Cyclone Track** to `example_Harald_2025_Track`

trans-unit.source: Set **Population Raster** to `MDG_WorldPop_2020_constrained.tif`
trans-unit.target: Set **Population Raster** to `MDG_WorldPop_2020_constrained.tif`

trans-unit.source: Set the model output **cyclone_harald_buffer** to `cyclone_harald_buffer`and save it in the `data` -> `output`
trans-unit.target: Set the model output **cyclone_harald_buffer** to `cyclone_harald_buffer`and save it in the `data` -> `output`

trans-unit.source: Set the model output **exposed_population_sum** to `Harald_Exposed_Population`and save it in the `data` -> `output`
trans-unit.target: Set the model output **exposed_population_sum** to `Harald_Exposed_Population`and save it in the `data` -> `output`
